businessContext_i18n.fr: Limite d'élasticité du matériau de l'arbre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Resistencia a la fluencia del material del eje.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify calculations with FEA or physical testing.
Use appropriate safety factors for design.

description.short: Calculate minimum shaft diameter under bending and torsion (ASME).
description.long: Calculate minimum shaft diameter under bending and torsion (ASME).

short_i18n.en: Calculate minimum shaft diameter under bending and torsion (ASME).
short_i18n.tr: Egilme ve burulma altindaki milin Minimum Diameterini ASME formulu ile hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den minimalen Wellendurchmesser unter Biegung und Torsion (ASME).
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le diamètre minimal de l'arbre sous flexion et torsion (ASME).
short_i18n.es: Calcular el diámetro mínimo del eje bajo flexión y torsión (ASME).
short_i18n.ar: حساب الحد الأدنى لقطر العمود تحت الانحناء والالتواء (ASME).
